resources.string: An account with this email already exists.
Please enter a valid email address.
Password must be at least 8 characters long.
Passwords don\'t match. Please try again.
No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
Incorrect email or password.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Request timed out. Please try again.
Google sign-in was cancelled.
Couldn\'t load your account data. Please check your connection and try again.
You need to be signed in to perform this action.
Failed to upload image. Please try again.
Couldn\'t load the post. It may have been deleted or you might have a poor internet connection.
Couldn\'t find the notification. It may have been deleted.
This user no longer exists. They may have deleted their account.
Friend request not found. It may have already been cancelled or accepted.
You\'ve already reported this post.
You\'ve already reported this user.
This post is currently being worked on and can\'t be deleted right now.
You can\'t delete this post because others have already built on it.
Someone else just started working on this post. Check back in a bit — it\'ll be available again soon.
You don\'t have an active session for this post. Try starting over.
Time\'s up! Your session expired before you could submit.
Something went wrong — this session doesn\'t match your request.
You recently left this post. Try again in a few minutes.
You already have an active session. To continue or cancel it, go to Profile → Settings → Game Session.
For security reasons, please sign out and sign back in before changing your email.
The link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new one.
New password must be different from your current password.
The request was cancelled. Try again.
Something got scrambled before it was sent. Check your input and try again.
The server took too long to respond. Check your connection and try again.
Couldn\'t find what you were looking for. It may have been deleted.
This already exists. No need to do it twice.
You don\'t have permission to do that.
Our servers are a bit overwhelmed right now. Wait a moment and try again.
Something isn\'t quite right on our end. Try again later.
The request was interrupted. Try again.
You need to be signed in to do that.
Couldn\'t reach our servers. Check your internet connection and try again.
Something went wrong on our end. We\'re on it — try again later.
